prose: **Formaldehyde HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) performed in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The molecular geometry came from a user-supplied `.xyz` file: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz` and was not re-optimized at DFT; DFT single-point calculation was done on this fixed geometry. SCF converged in 8 cycles. HOMO = −7.6523 eV, LUMO = −1.7826 eV → **HOMO–LUMO gap ≈ 5.8697 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap; not an excitation energy). Files: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpuqxu4egh/live.json`. No warnings reported.
